seo.title: CCRC Falls Prevention Guide | Life Plan Communities | Able Care
seo.description: Implement falls prevention in CCRCs and life plan communities. Download our guide with best practices and compliance checklists.

blocks.headline: Falls prevention for CCRCs and life plan communities.
blocks.subtitle: CCRCs face unique challenges across independent living, assisted living, and skilled nursing settings. This guide provides a framework for coordinated falls prevention across all care levels.
blocks.backgroundImageAlt: Therapist assessing a patient at their bedside

blocks.heading: What is inside the guide
blocks.body:
• Setting-specific assessment protocols for IL, AL, and SNF
  • Technology solutions for tracking residents through care transitions
  • Staff training frameworks for each care level
  • Environmental modification checklists
  • Regulatory compliance requirements by setting type
  • Measuring program effectiveness across the community

blocks.heading: Why this guide matters
blocks.body:
Falls are the leading cause of injury in senior living communities. CCRC residents expect safe, consistent care as they transition between care levels. A fall in one setting often triggers a cascade of decline that affects the entire community.

This guide equips leadership teams with evidence-based practices for coordinated falls prevention. It covers how to standardize screening, share data across settings, and demonstrate outcomes to residents, families, and regulators.

blocks.heading: Download the CCRC Falls Prevention Guide
blocks.body: Get the full guide with setting-specific protocols, compliance checklists, and implementation plans.
